title: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
